scripts.build: npm run build -w @orbit-id/core && npm run build -w @orbit-id/typescript && npm run build -w @orbit-id/cli && npm run build -w @orbit-id/node-lease && npm run build -w @orbit-id/playground
scripts.test: npm run test -w @orbit-id/core && npm run test -w @orbit-id/typescript && npm run test -w @orbit-id/cli && npm run test -w @orbit-id/node-lease
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @orbit-id/core && npm run typecheck -w @orbit-id/typescript && npm run typecheck -w @orbit-id/cli && npm run typecheck -w @orbit-id/node-lease && npm run typecheck -w @orbit-id/playground
scripts.bench: npm run build -w @orbit-id/core && npm run bench -w @orbit-id/benchmark
scripts.bench:ci: npm run build -w @orbit-id/core && npm run bench:ci -w @orbit-id/benchmark
